use_cases: Displaying user profile pictures in dashboard navigation headers
Showing user avatars in comment sections or discussion threads
Representing users in notification or activity feeds
Providing fallback initials when user images fail to load
Displaying team member avatars in collaboration interfaces
ai_summary: A Radix UI-based Avatar component with three sub-components (Avatar, AvatarImage, AvatarFallback) for displaying user profile images with graceful fallbacks. Features accessible design using Radix primitives, rounded-full styling, and shrink-0 behavior for consistent layout integration. Supports custom styling via className prop while maintaining consistent dimensions.
